backend.changelog: Two UX/dev fixes. (1) swStatusMsg engage/generate warnings (Unsaved changes, Other documents open, Wrong assembly active, Wrong tenant) now surface in the main toolbar with an amber chip + warning icon, not hidden inside the collapsed Columns dropdown -- bit today on PIN-001628 testing where Generate silently produced 0 files because two leftover SW parts had unsaved changes, but the explanatory message was invisible. (2) SPA Cache-Control split: Vite-hashed /assets/* gets max-age=1y immutable; index.html gets no-store. After Apply Update, the next navigation refetches index.html, references the new bundle hash, and pulls the new bundle -- NO hard-refresh required from the user.

cadBridge.changelog: ADR-019 Stage B -- agent honors StaleItems[] (EngItem PLMIDs) and StaleDrawingPids[] sent by frontend (1.1.13+). At Generate start, before the BOM-driven OpenDoc7-per-item loop, the agent enumerates open SW docs and closes any whose GetPLMID() matches the stale set. The subsequent EngItem-OpenDoc7 path (1.8.43+) then pulls the latest rep from the platform instead of returning the stale in-memory handle. New Stale bool on PreCacheDrawingItem skips the cached-.SLDDRW SwDm short-circuit and forces OpenDoc7. Backward compatible: older frontends sending empty / null lists trigger no close-pass.
